name: drm-free-audible

metadata.name: drm-free-audible
metadata.summary: A tool to remove DRM from Audible files

documentation:
# DRM free Audbile

Python script to remove DRM from my Audible files, so that they can be played in
devices like Garmin sports watches.

modules.name: drm_free_audible.main
documentation: Module sets up logging and runs the main application.

functions.name: drm_free_audible.main.setup_logging
documentation: Set up logging configuration from a YAML file.

functions.name: drm_free_audible.main.main
documentation: Set up logging and run the application.

modules.name: drm_free_audible.drm
documentation: Module provides functionality to remove DRM (Digital Righs Management) from Audible files.

functions.name: drm_free_audible.drm.create_drm_free_files
documentation: Create DRM free files in dst from aax files in src.
